case_title: SIREESHA BATTULA VS. KAMASU LIVINGSTON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATTULA, SIREESHA SERVED FEB-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIVINGSTON, KAMASU
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATTULA, SIREESHA AS TO DEFENDANT LIVINGSTON, KAMASU

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATTULA, SIREESHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVINGSTON, KAMASU $17,249.00 PRINCIPAL, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,684.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $9,563.89 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATTULA, SIREESHA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATTULA, SIREESHA AS TO DEFENDANT LIVINGSTON, KAMASU DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-23-2014
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LIVINGSTON, KAMASU
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-10-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $435.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LIVINGSTON, KAMASU
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT REQUESTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATTULA, SIREESHA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-10-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LIVINGSTON, KAMASU
